case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. STRATEGIC LEGAL RESOURCES, INC.

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT BY CONFESSION (TRANSACTION ID # 62077525) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: PETITIONER STRATEGIC LEGAL RESOURCES, INC. CONFESSES JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF RESPONDENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ("CITY") AND THE OFFICE OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT ("OLSE") IN THE SUM OF $206,649.40 WITH CREDIT FOR ANY PAYMENTS MADE TO THE CITY UNDER THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT CONCERNING OLSE CASE NO. HCSO-463 (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT TITLED WITH "STATEMENT CONFESSING JUDGMENT" FOR FULL DETAILS)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF STATEMENT CONFESSING JUDGMENT; EXHIBIT A (TRANSACTION ID # 62150849) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION
